revision.text: *quote: Relevant text quoted from the source. Displays enclosed in quotes.{{#if: {{{cs2|}}}|| When supplied, the citation terminator (a period by default) is suppressed, so the quote must include terminating punctuation.}} If '''script-quote''' is defined, use '''quote''' to hold a [[WP:ROMAN|Romanization]] (if available) of the text in '''script-quote'''. ** '''script-quote''': Original quotation for languages that do not use a Latin-based script (Arabic, Chinese, Cyrillic, Greek, Hebrew, Japanese, Korean, etc.); not italicized, follows italicized Romanization defined in '''quote''' (if available). Alias: none. Must be prefixed with one of the [[Help:Citation_Style_1#{{pipe}}script-<param>{{=}} language codes|supported language codes]] to help browsers properly display the script: **:... |quote=Tōkyō tawā |script-quote=ja:東京タワー |trans-quote=Tokyo Tower ... ** trans-quote: English translation of the quotation if the source quoted is in a foreign language. Displays in square brackets. Alias: none.{{#if:{{{unpaginated|}}}|| * quote-page: The number of a single page quoted in {{para|quote}}. Use either {{para|quote-page}} or {{para|quote-pages}}, but not both. Should be a subset of the page(s) specified in {{para|page}}, {{para|pages}} or {{para|at}}. Displays preceded by {{code|p.}} unless {{para|no-pp|yes}}. If hyphenated, use {{tl|hyphen}} to indicate this is intentional (e.g. {{para|quote-page|3{{hyphen}}12}}). Alias: none. * OR: quote-pages: A list or range of pages quoted in {{para|quote}}. Use either {{para|quote-page}} or {{para|quote-pages}}, but not both. Should be a subset of the pages specified in {{para|pages}} or {{para|at}}. Separate using an en dash (–); separate non-sequential pages with a comma (,). Displays preceded by {{code|pp.}} unless {{para|no-pp|yes}} is defined. Hyphens are automatically converted to en dashes; if hyphens are appropriate because individual page numbers contain hyphens, for example: pp. 3-1–3-15, use [[Help:Citation_Style_1#Accept-this-as-written_markup|double parentheses]] to tell the template to display the value of {{para|quote-pages}} without processing it, and use {{tl|hyphen}} to indicate to editors that a hyphen is really intended: {{para|quote-pages|((3{{hyphen}}1{{ndash}}3{{hyphen}}15))}}. Alias: none.}}

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text: *quote: Relevant text quoted from the source. Displays enclosed in quotes.{{#if: {{{cs2|}}}|| When supplied, the citation terminator (a period by default) is suppressed, so the quote must include terminating punctuation.}} If '''script-quote''' is defined, use '''quote''' to hold a [[WP:ROMAN|Romanization]] (if available) of the text in '''script-quote'''. ** '''script-quote''': Original quotation for languages that do not use a Latin-based script (Arabic, Chinese, Cyrillic, Greek, Hebrew, Japanese, Korean, etc.); not italicized, follows italicized Romanization defined in '''quote''' (if available). Alias: none. Must be prefixed with one of the [[Help:Citation_Style_1#{{pipe}}script-<param>{{=}} language codes|supported language codes]] to help browsers properly display the script: **:... |quote=Tōkyō tawā |script-quote=ja:東京タワー |trans-quote=Tokyo Tower ... ** trans-quote: English translation of the quotation if the source quoted is in a foreign language. Displays in square brackets. Alias: none.{{#if:{{{unpaginated|}}}|| * quote-page: The number of a single page quoted in {{para|quote}}. Use either {{para|quote-page}} or {{para|quote-pages}}, but not both. Should be a subset of the page(s) specified in {{para|page}}, {{para|pages}} or {{para|at}}. Displays preceded by {{code|p.}} unless {{para|no-pp|yes}}. If hyphenated, use {{tl|hyphen}} to indicate this is intentional (e.g. {{para|quote-page|3{{hyphen}}12}}). Alias: none. * OR: quote-pages: A list or range of pages quoted in {{para|quote}}. Use either {{para|quote-page}} or {{para|quote-pages}}, but not both. Should be a subset of the pages specified in {{para|pages}} or {{para|at}}. Separate using an en dash (–); separate non-sequential pages with a comma (,). Displays preceded by {{code|pp.}} unless {{para|no-pp|yes}} is defined. Hyphens are automatically converted to en dashes; if hyphens are appropriate because individual page numbers contain hyphens, for example: pp. 3-1–3-15, use [[Help:Citation_Style_1#Accept-this-as-written_markup|double parentheses]] to tell the template to display the value of {{para|quote-pages}} without processing it, and use {{tl|hyphen}} to indicate to editors that a hyphen is really intended: {{para|quote-pages|((3{{hyphen}}1{{ndash}}3{{hyphen}}15))}}. Alias: none.}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text: *quote: Relevant text quoted from the source. Displays enclosed in quotes.{{#if: {{{cs2|}}}|| When supplied, the citation terminator (a period by default) is suppressed, so the quote must include terminating punctuation.}} If '''script-quote''' is defined, use '''quote''' to hold a [[WP:ROMAN|Romanization]] (if available) of the text in '''script-quote'''. ** '''script-quote''': Original quotation for languages that do not use a Latin-based script (Arabic, Chinese, Cyrillic, Greek, Hebrew, Japanese, Korean, etc.); not italicized, follows italicized Romanization defined in '''quote''' (if available). Alias: none. Must be prefixed with one of the [[Help:Citation_Style_1#{{pipe}}script-<param>{{=}} language codes|supported language codes]] to help browsers properly display the script: **:... |quote=Tōkyō tawā |script-quote=ja:東京タワー |trans-quote=Tokyo Tower ... ** trans-quote: English translation of the quotation if the source quoted is in a foreign language. Displays in square brackets. Alias: none.{{#if:{{{unpaginated|}}}|| * quote-page: The number of a single page quoted in {{para|quote}}. Use either {{para|quote-page}} or {{para|quote-pages}}, but not both. Should be a subset of the page(s) specified in {{para|page}}, {{para|pages}} or {{para|at}}. Displays preceded by {{code|p.}} unless {{para|no-pp|yes}}. If hyphenated, use {{tl|hyphen}} to indicate this is intentional (e.g. {{para|quote-page|3{{hyphen}}12}}). Alias: none. * OR: quote-pages: A list or range of pages quoted in {{para|quote}}. Use either {{para|quote-page}} or {{para|quote-pages}}, but not both. Should be a subset of the pages specified in {{para|pages}} or {{para|at}}. Separate using an en dash (–); separate non-sequential pages with a comma (,). Displays preceded by {{code|pp.}} unless {{para|no-pp|yes}} is defined. Hyphens are automatically converted to en dashes; if hyphens are appropriate because individual page numbers contain hyphens, for example: pp. 3-1–3-15, use [[Help:Citation_Style_1#Accept-this-as-written_markup|double parentheses]] to tell the template to display the value of {{para|quote-pages}} without processing it, and use {{tl|hyphen}} to indicate to editors that a hyphen is really intended: {{para|quote-pages|((3{{hyphen}}1{{ndash}}3{{hyphen}}15))}}. Alias: none.}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text: *quote: Relevant text quoted from the source. Displays enclosed in quotes.{{#if: {{{cs2|}}}|| When supplied, the citation terminator (a period by default) is suppressed, so the quote must include terminating punctuation.}} If '''script-quote''' is defined, use '''quote''' to hold a [[WP:ROMAN|Romanization]] (if available) of the text in '''script-quote'''. ** '''script-quote''': Original quotation for languages that do not use a Latin-based script (Arabic, Chinese, Cyrillic, Greek, Hebrew, Japanese, Korean, etc.); not italicized, follows italicized Romanization defined in '''quote''' (if available). Alias: none. Must be prefixed with one of the [[Help:Citation_Style_1#{{pipe}}script-<param>{{=}} language codes|supported language codes]] to help browsers properly display the script: **:... |quote=Tōkyō tawā |script-quote=ja:東京タワー |trans-quote=Tokyo Tower ... ** trans-quote: English translation of the quotation if the source quoted is in a foreign language. Displays in square brackets. Alias: none.{{#if:{{{unpaginated|}}}|| * quote-page: The number of a single page quoted in {{para|quote}}. Use either {{para|quote-page}} or {{para|quote-pages}}, but not both. Should be a subset of the page(s) specified in {{para|page}}, {{para|pages}} or {{para|at}}. Displays preceded by {{code|p.}} unless {{para|no-pp|yes}}. If hyphenated, use {{tl|hyphen}} to indicate this is intentional (e.g. {{para|quote-page|3{{hyphen}}12}}). Alias: none. * OR: quote-pages: A list or range of pages quoted in {{para|quote}}. Use either {{para|quote-page}} or {{para|quote-pages}}, but not both. Should be a subset of the pages specified in {{para|pages}} or {{para|at}}. Separate using an en dash (–); separate non-sequential pages with a comma (,). Displays preceded by {{code|pp.}} unless {{para|no-pp|yes}} is defined. Hyphens are automatically converted to en dashes; if hyphens are appropriate because individual page numbers contain hyphens, for example: pp. 3-1–3-15, use [[Help:Citation_Style_1#Accept-this-as-written_markup|double parentheses]] to tell the template to display the value of {{para|quote-pages}} without processing it, and use {{tl|hyphen}} to indicate to editors that a hyphen is really intended: {{para|quote-pages|((3{{hyphen}}1{{ndash}}3{{hyphen}}15))}}. Alias: none.}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: *quote: Relevant text quoted from the source. Displays enclosed in quotes.{{#if: {{{cs2|}}}|| When supplied, the citation terminator (a period by default) is suppressed, so the quote must include terminating punctuation.}} If '''script-quote''' is defined, use '''quote''' to hold a [[WP:ROMAN|Romanization]] (if available) of the text in '''script-quote'''. ** '''script-quote''': Original quotation for languages that do not use a Latin-based script (Arabic, Chinese, Cyrillic, Greek, Hebrew, Japanese, Korean, etc.); not italicized, follows italicized Romanization defined in '''quote''' (if available). Alias: none. Must be prefixed with one of the [[Help:Citation_Style_1#{{pipe}}script-<param>{{=}} language codes|supported language codes]] to help browsers properly display the script: **:... |quote=Tōkyō tawā |script-quote=ja:東京タワー |trans-quote=Tokyo Tower ... ** trans-quote: English translation of the quotation if the source quoted is in a foreign language. Displays in square brackets. Alias: none.{{#if:{{{unpaginated|}}}|| * quote-page: The number of a single page quoted in {{para|quote}}. Use either {{para|quote-page}} or {{para|quote-pages}}, but not both. Should be a subset of the page(s) specified in {{para|page}}, {{para|pages}} or {{para|at}}. Displays preceded by {{code|p.}} unless {{para|no-pp|yes}}. If hyphenated, use {{tl|hyphen}} to indicate this is intentional (e.g. {{para|quote-page|3{{hyphen}}12}}). Alias: none. * OR: quote-pages: A list or range of pages quoted in {{para|quote}}. Use either {{para|quote-page}} or {{para|quote-pages}}, but not both. Should be a subset of the pages specified in {{para|pages}} or {{para|at}}. Separate using an en dash (–); separate non-sequential pages with a comma (,). Displays preceded by {{code|pp.}} unless {{para|no-pp|yes}} is defined. Hyphens are automatically converted to en dashes; if hyphens are appropriate because individual page numbers contain hyphens, for example: pp. 3-1–3-15, use [[Help:Citation_Style_1#Accept-this-as-written_markup|double parentheses]] to tell the template to display the value of {{para|quote-pages}} without processing it, and use {{tl|hyphen}} to indicate to editors that a hyphen is really intended: {{para|quote-pages|((3{{hyphen}}1{{ndash}}3{{hyphen}}15))}}. Alias: none.}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: *quote: Relevant text quoted from the source. Displays enclosed in quotes.{{#if: {{{cs2|}}}|| When supplied, the citation terminator (a period by default) is suppressed, so the quote must include terminating punctuation.}} If '''script-quote''' is defined, use '''quote''' to hold a [[WP:ROMAN|Romanization]] (if available) of the text in '''script-quote'''. ** '''script-quote''': Original quotation for languages that do not use a Latin-based script (Arabic, Chinese, Cyrillic, Greek, Hebrew, Japanese, Korean, etc.); not italicized, follows italicized Romanization defined in '''quote''' (if available). Alias: none. Must be prefixed with one of the [[Help:Citation_Style_1#{{pipe}}script-<param>{{=}} language codes|supported language codes]] to help browsers properly display the script: **:... |quote=Tōkyō tawā |script-quote=ja:東京タワー |trans-quote=Tokyo Tower ... ** trans-quote: English translation of the quotation if the source quoted is in a foreign language. Displays in square brackets. Alias: none.{{#if:{{{unpaginated|}}}|| * quote-page: The number of a single page quoted in {{para|quote}}. Use either {{para|quote-page}} or {{para|quote-pages}}, but not both. Should be a subset of the page(s) specified in {{para|page}}, {{para|pages}} or {{para|at}}. Displays preceded by {{code|p.}} unless {{para|no-pp|yes}}. If hyphenated, use {{tl|hyphen}} to indicate this is intentional (e.g. {{para|quote-page|3{{hyphen}}12}}). Alias: none. * OR: quote-pages: A list or range of pages quoted in {{para|quote}}. Use either {{para|quote-page}} or {{para|quote-pages}}, but not both. Should be a subset of the pages specified in {{para|pages}} or {{para|at}}. Separate using an en dash (–); separate non-sequential pages with a comma (,). Displays preceded by {{code|pp.}} unless {{para|no-pp|yes}} is defined. Hyphens are automatically converted to en dashes; if hyphens are appropriate because individual page numbers contain hyphens, for example: pp. 3-1–3-15, use [[Help:Citation_Style_1#Accept-this-as-written_markup|double parentheses]] to tell the template to display the value of {{para|quote-pages}} without processing it, and use {{tl|hyphen}} to indicate to editors that a hyphen is really intended: {{para|quote-pages|((3{{hyphen}}1{{ndash}}3{{hyphen}}15))}}. Alias: none.}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: *quote: Relevant text quoted from the source. Displays enclosed in quotes.{{#if: {{{cs2|}}}|| When supplied, the citation terminator (a period by default) is suppressed, so the quote must include terminating punctuation.}} If '''script-quote''' is defined, use '''quote''' to hold a [[WP:ROMAN|Romanization]] (if available) of the text in '''script-quote'''. ** '''script-quote''': Original quotation for languages that do not use a Latin-based script (Arabic, Chinese, Cyrillic, Greek, Hebrew, Japanese, Korean, etc.); not italicized, follows italicized Romanization defined in '''quote''' (if available). Alias: none. Must be prefixed with one of the [[Help:Citation_Style_1#{{pipe}}script-<param>{{=}} language codes|supported language codes]] to help browsers properly display the script: **:... |quote=Tōkyō tawā |script-quote=ja:東京タワー |trans-quote=Tokyo Tower ... ** trans-quote: English translation of the quotation if the source quoted is in a foreign language. Displays in square brackets. Alias: none.{{#if:{{{unpaginated|}}}|| * quote-page: The number of a single page quoted in {{para|quote}}. Use either {{para|quote-page}} or {{para|quote-pages}}, but not both. Should be a subset of the page(s) specified in {{para|page}}, {{para|pages}} or {{para|at}}. Displays preceded by {{code|p.}} unless {{para|no-pp|yes}}. If hyphenated, use {{tl|hyphen}} to indicate this is intentional (e.g. {{para|quote-page|3{{hyphen}}12}}). Alias: none. * OR: quote-pages: A list or range of pages quoted in {{para|quote}}. Use either {{para|quote-page}} or {{para|quote-pages}}, but not both. Should be a subset of the pages specified in {{para|pages}} or {{para|at}}. Separate using an en dash (–); separate non-sequential pages with a comma (,). Displays preceded by {{code|pp.}} unless {{para|no-pp|yes}} is defined. Hyphens are automatically converted to en dashes; if hyphens are appropriate because individual page numbers contain hyphens, for example: pp. 3-1–3-15, use [[Help:Citation_Style_1#Accept-this-as-written_markup|double parentheses]] to tell the template to display the value of {{para|quote-pages}} without processing it, and use {{tl|hyphen}} to indicate to editors that a hyphen is really intended: {{para|quote-pages|((3{{hyphen}}1{{ndash}}3{{hyphen}}15))}}. Alias: none.}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23168229401|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: *quote: Relevant text quoted from the source. Displays enclosed in quotes.{{#if: {{{cs2|}}}|| When supplied, the citation terminator (a period by default) is suppressed, so the quote must include terminating punctuation.}} If '''script-quote''' is defined, use '''quote''' to hold a [[WP:ROMAN|Romanization]] (if available) of the text in '''script-quote'''. ** '''script-quote''': Original quotation for languages that do not use a Latin-based script (Arabic, Chinese, Cyrillic, Greek, Hebrew, Japanese, Korean, etc.); not italicized, follows italicized Romanization defined in '''quote''' (if available). Alias: none. Must be prefixed with one of the [[Help:Citation_Style_1#{{pipe}}script-<param>{{=}} language codes|supported language codes]] to help browsers properly display the script: **:... |quote=Tōkyō tawā |script-quote=ja:東京タワー |trans-quote=Tokyo Tower ... ** trans-quote: English translation of the quotation if the source quoted is in a foreign language. Displays in square brackets. Alias: none.{{#if:{{{unpaginated|}}}|| * quote-page: The number of a single page quoted in {{para|quote}}. Use either {{para|quote-page}} or {{para|quote-pages}}, but not both. Should be a subset of the page(s) specified in {{para|page}}, {{para|pages}} or {{para|at}}. Displays preceded by {{code|p.}} unless {{para|no-pp|yes}}. If hyphenated, use {{tl|hyphen}} to indicate this is intentional (e.g. {{para|quote-page|3{{hyphen}}12}}). Alias: none. * OR: quote-pages: A list or range of pages quoted in {{para|quote}}. Use either {{para|quote-page}} or {{para|quote-pages}}, but not both. Should be a subset of the pages specified in {{para|pages}} or {{para|at}}. Separate using an en dash (–); separate non-sequential pages with a comma (,). Displays preceded by {{code|pp.}} unless {{para|no-pp|yes}} is defined. Hyphens are automatically converted to en dashes; if hyphens are appropriate because individual page numbers contain hyphens, for example: pp. 3-1–3-15, use [[Help:Citation_Style_1#Accept-this-as-written_markup|double parentheses]] to tell the template to display the value of {{para|quote-pages}} without processing it, and use {{tl|hyphen}} to indicate to editors that a hyphen is really intended: {{para|quote-pages|((3{{hyphen}}1{{ndash}}3{{hyphen}}15))}}. Alias: none.}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

*quote: Relevant text quoted from the source. Displays enclosed in quotes.{{#if: {{{cs2|}}}|| When supplied, the citation terminator (a period by default) is suppressed, so the quote must include terminating punctuation.}} If '''script-quote''' is defined, use '''quote''' to hold a [[WP:ROMAN|Romanization]] (if available) of the text in '''script-quote'''. ** '''script-quote''': Original quotation for languages that do not use a Latin-based script (Arabic, Chinese, Cyrillic, Greek, Hebrew, Japanese, Korean, etc.); not italicized, follows italicized Romanization defined in '''quote''' (if available). Alias: none. Must be prefixed with one of the [[Help:Citation_Style_1#{{pipe}}script-<param>{{=}} language codes|supported language codes]] to help browsers properly display the script: **:... |quote=Tōkyō tawā |script-quote=ja:東京タワー |trans-quote=Tokyo Tower ... ** trans-quote: English translation of the quotation if the source quoted is in a foreign language. Displays in square brackets. Alias: none.{{#if:{{{unpaginated|}}}|| * quote-page: The number of a single page quoted in {{para|quote}}. Use either {{para|quote-page}} or {{para|quote-pages}}, but not both. Should be a subset of the page(s) specified in {{para|page}}, {{para|pages}} or {{para|at}}. Displays preceded by {{code|p.}} unless {{para|no-pp|yes}}. If hyphenated, use {{tl|hyphen}} to indicate this is intentional (e.g. {{para|quote-page|3{{hyphen}}12}}). Alias: none. * OR: quote-pages: A list or range of pages quoted in {{para|quote}}. Use either {{para|quote-page}} or {{para|quote-pages}}, but not both. Should be a subset of the pages specified in {{para|pages}} or {{para|at}}. Separate using an en dash (–); separate non-sequential pages with a comma (,). Displays preceded by {{code|pp.}} unless {{para|no-pp|yes}} is defined. Hyphens are automatically converted to en dashes; if hyphens are appropriate because individual page numbers contain hyphens, for example: pp. 3-1–3-15, use [[Help:Citation_Style_1#Accept-this-as-written_markup|double parentheses]] to tell the template to display the value of {{para|quote-pages}} without processing it, and use {{tl|hyphen}} to indicate to editors that a hyphen is really intended: {{para|quote-pages|((3{{hyphen}}1{{ndash}}3{{hyphen}}15))}}. Alias: none.}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Citation_Style_documentation%2Fquote here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: *quote: Relevant text quoted from the source. Displays enclosed in quotes.{{#if: {{{cs2|}}}|| When supplied, the citation terminator (a period by default) is suppressed, so the quote must include terminating punctuation.}} If '''script-quote''' is defined, use '''quote''' to hold a [[WP:ROMAN|Romanization]] (if available) of the text in '''script-quote'''. ** '''script-quote''': Original quotation for languages that do not use a Latin-based script (Arabic, Chinese, Cyrillic, Greek, Hebrew, Japanese, Korean, etc.); not italicized, follows italicized Romanization defined in '''quote''' (if available). Alias: none. Must be prefixed with one of the [[Help:Citation_Style_1#{{pipe}}script-<param>{{=}} language codes|supported language codes]] to help browsers properly display the script: **:... |quote=Tōkyō tawā |script-quote=ja:東京タワー |trans-quote=Tokyo Tower ... ** trans-quote: English translation of the quotation if the source quoted is in a foreign language. Displays in square brackets. Alias: none.{{#if:{{{unpaginated|}}}|| * quote-page: The number of a single page quoted in {{para|quote}}. Use either {{para|quote-page}} or {{para|quote-pages}}, but not both. Should be a subset of the page(s) specified in {{para|page}}, {{para|pages}} or {{para|at}}. Displays preceded by {{code|p.}} unless {{para|no-pp|yes}}. If hyphenated, use {{tl|hyphen}} to indicate this is intentional (e.g. {{para|quote-page|3{{hyphen}}12}}). Alias: none. * OR: quote-pages: A list or range of pages quoted in {{para|quote}}. Use either {{para|quote-page}} or {{para|quote-pages}}, but not both. Should be a subset of the pages specified in {{para|pages}} or {{para|at}}. Separate using an en dash (–); separate non-sequential pages with a comma (,). Displays preceded by {{code|pp.}} unless {{para|no-pp|yes}} is defined. Hyphens are automatically converted to en dashes; if hyphens are appropriate because individual page numbers contain hyphens, for example: pp. 3-1–3-15, use [[Help:Citation_Style_1#Accept-this-as-written_markup|double parentheses]] to tell the template to display the value of {{para|quote-pages}} without processing it, and use {{tl|hyphen}} to indicate to editors that a hyphen is really intended: {{para|quote-pages|((3{{hyphen}}1{{ndash}}3{{hyphen}}15))}}. Alias: none.}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
